ogTitle: Pakenham Upper vs Panmure: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pakenham Upper and Panmure.
heading: Pakenham Upper vs Panmure — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pakenham Upper, Victoria and Panmure, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Panmure has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Pakenham Upper (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pakenham Upper or Panmure safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pakenham Upper has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Panmure scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pakenham Upper scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Panmure scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pakenham Upper or Panmure?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Panmure has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
